prompt: An architectural diagram showing three horizontal layers stacked vertically on a white background with teal/emerald color palette. Top layer labeled 'Identity': three boxes labeled 'Brand', 'Registry', and 'Accounts' connected by clean lines. Middle layer labeled 'Transaction': four boxes in a row labeled 'Media Buy', 'Creative', 'Signals', and 'Sponsored Intelligence'. Bottom layer labeled 'Governance': a single wide box with a shield icon that has dotted connection lines reaching up to every box in the transaction layer, showing it operates across all domains. Clean arrows flow downward from the top through the middle. The diagram feels architectural and organized — a clear system map. Use clean sans-serif font for all labels. Flat illustration style with minimal gradients.
alt_text: Three-layer architecture diagram showing identity layer (Brand, Registry, Accounts) at top, transaction domains (Media Buy, Creative, Signals, Sponsored Intelligence) in the middle, and Governance as a cross-cutting layer connecting to all transaction domains

prompt: A four-tier ecosystem diagram on white background with teal/emerald color palette. Top tier labeled 'Business Principals': two human figure icons with labels 'Buyer' and 'Seller'. Second tier labeled 'Orchestration': a central hub labeled 'Buyer Agent' connected to three smaller hubs via clean lines, labeled 'Sales Agent', 'Creative Agent', and 'Signal Agent'. Third tier labeled 'Execution': two connected shapes labeled 'Ad Server' and 'DSP'. Fourth tier spanning full width labeled 'Governance': a shield icon labeled 'Governance Agent' next to a human figure labeled 'Human Oversight', connected by dotted lines to every tier above. The tiers are clearly separated with space between them, flowing top to bottom. Use clean sans-serif font for all labels. Flat illustration style with minimal gradients.
alt_text: Four-tier ecosystem diagram showing Business Principals (Buyer, Seller) at top, Orchestration (Buyer Agent, Sales Agent, Creative Agent, Signal Agent) in the middle, Execution (Ad Server, DSP) below, and Governance (Governance Agent, Human Oversight) spanning all layers
